movie.actors: T.J. Miller, James Corden, Anna Faris, Maya Rudolph
movie.plot: Gene, a multi-expressional emoji, sets out on a journey to become a normal emoji.
movie.title: The Emoji Movie
movie.writer: Tony Leondis (screenplay by), Eric Siegel (screenplay by), Mike White (screenplay by), Tony Leondis (story by), Eric Siegel (story by), John Hoffman (additional screenplay material)
